APIError.description: APIError is an api error with a message

repositories.description:
Indicates that an access token only has access to the specified repositories.  Will be null if the access token
is not limited to a set of specified repositories.

AccessToken.title: AccessToken represents an API access token.

ScheduleID.description: the cron id for the schedule trigger

commit_sha.description: the commit sha the action run ran on

created.description: when the action run was created

event.description: the webhook event that causes the workflow to run

event_payload.description: the payload of the webhook event that causes the workflow to run

html_url.description: the url of this action run

index_in_repo.description: a unique number for each run of a repository

is_fork_pull_request.description: If this is triggered by a PR from a forked repository or an untrusted user, we need to check if it is approved and limit permissions when running the workflow.

is_ref_deleted.description: has the commit/tag/… the action run ran on been deleted

need_approval.description: may need approval if it's a fork pull request

prettyref.description: the commit/tag/… the action run ran on

started.description: when the action run was started

status.description: the current status of this run

stopped.description: when the action run was stopped

trigger_event.description: the trigger event defined in the `on` configuration of the triggered workflow

updated.description: when the action run was last updated

ActionRunJob.description: ActionRunJob represents a job of a run

attempt.description: How many times the job has been attempted including the current attempt.

handle.description: Opaque identifier that uniquely identifies a single attempt of a job.

needs.description: the action run job needed ids

runs_on.description: the action run job labels to run on

task_id.description: the action run job latest task id

ActionVariable.description: ActionVariable return value of the query API

owner_id.description: the owner to which the variable belongs

repo_id.description: the repository to which the variable belongs

AddCollaboratorOption.description: AddCollaboratorOption options when adding a user as a collaborator of a repository

AddTimeOption.description: AddTimeOption options for adding time to an issue

BranchProtection.description: BranchProtection represents a branch protection for a repository

ChangeFileOperation.description: ChangeFileOperation for creating, updating or deleting a file

content.description: new or updated file content, must be base64 encoded

from_path.description: old path of the file to move

operation.description: indicates what to do with the file

path.description: path to the existing or new file

sha.description: sha is the SHA for the file that already exists, required for update or delete

ChangeFilesOptions.description:
ChangeFilesOptions options for creating, updating or deleting multiple files
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)

branch.description: branch (optional) to base this file from. if not given, the default branch is used

message.description: message (optional) for the commit of this file. if not supplied, a default message will be used

new_branch.description: new_branch (optional) will make a new branch from `branch` before creating the file

signoff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer at the end of the commit log message.

CombinedStatus.description: CombinedStatus holds the combined state of several statuses for a single commit

Comment.description: Comment represents a comment on a commit or issue

created_at.description: The time of the comment's creation

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the comment

issue_url.description: The HTML URL of the issue if the comment is posted on an issue, else empty string

original_author.description: The original author that posted the comment if it was not posted locally, else empty string

original_author_id.description: The ID of the original author that posted the comment if it was not posted locally, else 0

pull_request_url.description: The HTML URL of the pull request if the comment is posted on a pull request, else empty string

updated_at.description: The time of the comment's update

Commit.title: Commit contains information generated from a Git commit.

CommitAffectedFiles.description: CommitAffectedFiles store information about files affected by the commit

CommitDateOptions.description: CommitDateOptions store dates for GIT_AUTHOR_DATE and GIT_COMMITTER_DATE

CommitMeta.title: CommitMeta contains meta information of a commit in terms of API.

CommitStats.description: CommitStats is statistics for a RepoCommit

CommitStatus.description: CommitStatus holds a single status of a single Commit

CommitStatusState.description:
CommitStatusState holds the state of a CommitStatus
It can be "pending", "success", "error", "failure" and "warning"

CommitUser.title: CommitUser contains information of a user in the context of a commit.

Compare.title: Compare represents a comparison between two commits.

ContentsResponse.description: ContentsResponse contains information about a repo's entry's (dir, file, symlink, submodule) metadata and content

content.description: `content` is populated when `type` is `file`, otherwise null

encoding.description: `encoding` is populated when `type` is `file`, otherwise null

submodule_git_url.description: `submodule_git_url` is populated when `type` is `submodule`, otherwise null

target.description: `target` is populated when `type` is `symlink`, otherwise null

repositories.description: If provided and not-empty, creates an access token with access only to specified repositories.

old_branch_name.description:

CreateLabelOption.description: CreateLabelOption options for creating a label

CreateMilestoneOption.description: CreateMilestoneOption options for creating a milestone

CreateOAuth2ApplicationOptions.description: CreateOAuth2ApplicationOptions holds options to create an oauth2 application

data.description:
Data of the secret. Special characters will be retained. Line endings will be normalized to LF to match the
behaviour of browsers. Encode the data with Base64 if line endings should be retained.

CreateOrUpdateSecretOption.title: CreateOrUpdateSecretOption defines the properties of the secret to create or update.

new_position.description: if comment to new file line or 0

old_position.description: if comment to old file line or 0

rules.description:
Rules to add to the newly created group.
If a rule does not exist, it will be created.

limit.description: The limit set by the rule

name.description: Name of the rule to create

subjects.description: The subjects affected by the rule

CreateReleaseOption.description: CreateReleaseOption options when creating a release

auto_init.description: Whether the repository should be auto-initialized?

default_branch.description: DefaultBranch of the repository (used when initializes and in template)

description.description: Description of the repository to create

name.description: Name of the repository to create

object_format_name.description: ObjectFormatName of the underlying git repository

readme.description: Readme of the repository to create

CreateTagOption.description: CreateTagOption options when creating a tag

CreateTagProtectionOption.description: CreateTagProtectionOption options for creating a tag protection

CreateTeamOption.description: CreateTeamOption options for creating a team

created_at.description:
For explicitly setting the user creation timestamp. Useful when users are
migrated from other systems. When omitted, the user's creation timestamp
will be set to "now".

value.description:
Value of the variable to create. Special characters will be retained. Line endings will be normalized to LF to
match the behaviour of browsers. Encode the data with Base64 if line endings should be retained.

CreateVariableOption.title: CreateVariableOption defines the properties of the variable to create.

message.description: optional commit message summarizing the change

title.description: page title. leave empty to keep unchanged

DeleteFileOptions options for deleting files (used for other File structs below)
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)

branch.description: branch (optional) to base this file from. if not given, the default branch is used

message.description: message (optional) for the commit of this file. if not supplied, a default message will be used

new_branch.description: new_branch (optional) will make a new branch from `branch` before creating the file

sha.description: sha is the SHA for the file that already exists

signoff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer at the end of the commit log message.

inputs.description: Input keys and values configured in the workflow file.

return_run_info.description: Flag to return the run info

run_number.description: a unique number for each run of a repository

Duration.description:
A Duration represents the elapsed time between two instants
as an int64 nanosecond count. The representation limits the
largest representable duration to approximately 290 years.

EditLabelOption.description: EditLabelOption options for editing a label

limit.description: The limit set by the rule

subjects.description: The subjects affected by the rule

EditReleaseOption.description: EditReleaseOption options when editing a release

EditRepoOption.description: EditRepoOption options when editing a repository's properties

allow_fast_forward_only_merge.description: either `true` to allow fast-forward-only merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent fast-forward-only merging.

allow_manual_merge.description: either `true` to allow mark pr as merged manually, or `false` to prevent it.

allow_merge_commits.description: either `true` to allow merging pull requests with a merge commit, or `false` to prevent merging pull requests with merge commits.

allow_rebase.description: either `true` to allow rebase-merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent rebase-merging.

allow_rebase_explicit.description: either `true` to allow rebase with explicit merge commits (--no-ff), or `false` to prevent rebase with explicit merge commits.

allow_rebase_update.description: either `true` to allow updating pull request branch by rebase, or `false` to prevent it.

allow_squash_merge.description: either `true` to allow squash-merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent squash-merging.

archived.description: set to `true` to archive this repository.

autodetect_manual_merge.description: either `true` to enable AutodetectManualMerge, or `false` to prevent it. Note: In some special cases, misjudgments can occur.

default_allow_maintainer_edit.description: set to `true` to allow edits from maintainers by default

default_branch.description: sets the default branch for this repository.

default_delete_branch_after_merge.description: set to `true` to delete pr branch after merge by default

default_merge_style.description: set to a merge style to be used by this repository: "merge", "rebase", "rebase-merge", "squash", "fast-forward-only", "manually-merged", or "rebase-update-only".

default_update_style.description: set to a update style to be used by this repository: "rebase" or "merge"

description.description: a short description of the repository.

enable_prune.description: enable prune - remove obsolete remote-tracking references when mirroring

globally_editable_wiki.description: set the globally editable state of the wiki

has_actions.description: either `true` to enable actions unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_issues.description: either `true` to enable issues for this repository or `false` to disable them.

has_packages.description: either `true` to enable packages unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_projects.description: either `true` to enable project unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_pull_requests.description: either `true` to allow pull requests, or `false` to prevent pull request.

has_releases.description: either `true` to enable releases unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_wiki.description: either `true` to enable the wiki for this repository or `false` to disable it.

ignore_whitespace_conflicts.description: either `true` to ignore whitespace for conflicts, or `false` to not ignore whitespace.

mirror_interval.description: set to a string like `8h30m0s` to set the mirror interval time

private.description:
either `true` to make the repository private or `false` to make it public.
Note: you will get a 422 error if the organization restricts changing repository visibility to organization
owners and a non-owner tries to change the value of private.

template.description: either `true` to make this repository a template or `false` to make it a normal repository

website.description: a URL with more information about the repository.

wiki_branch.description: sets the branch used for this repository's wiki.

EditTagProtectionOption.description: EditTagProtectionOption options for editing a tag protection

EditTeamOption.description: EditTeamOption options for editing a team

Email.description: Email an email address belonging to a user

external_tracker_regexp_pattern.description: External Issue Tracker issue regular expression

external_tracker_style.description: External Issue Tracker Number Format, either `numeric`, `alphanumeric`, or `regexp`

ExternalWiki.description: ExternalWiki represents setting for external wiki

enable_issue_dependencies.description: Enable dependencies for issues and pull requests (Built-in issue tracker)

conflict.description: APIConflict is a conflict empty response

forbidden.description: APIForbiddenError is a forbidden error response

internalServerError.description: APIInternalServerError is an error that is raised when an internal server error occurs

invalidTopicsError.description: APIInvalidTopicsError is error format response to invalid topics

notFound.description: APINotFound is a not found error response

repoArchivedError.description: APIRepoArchivedError is an error that is raised when an archived repo should be modified

unauthorized.description: APIUnauthorizedError is a unauthorized error response

validationError.description: APIValidationError is error format response related to input validation

AuthorizationHeaderToken.description: API tokens must be prepended with "token" followed by a space.
AuthorizationHeaderToken.name: Authorization

SudoHeader.description: Sudo API request as the user provided as the key. Admin privileges are required.
SudoHeader.name: Sudo

SudoParam.description: Sudo API request as the user provided as the key. Admin privileges are required.
SudoParam.name: sudo

TOTPHeader.description: Must be used in combination with BasicAuth if two-factor authentication is enabled.
TOTPHeader.name: X-FORGEJO-OTP
